message:
test(coverage): add tests for validate and serve commands, fix stale tests

- Fix stale.test.ts: replace process.stdout.write patching with console.log
  patching (works correctly in Bun)
- Add validate-command.test.ts: tests for input validation, error handling,
  and evidenceCountGate function (improves coverage from 4.35% to 27%)
- Expand serve-stats.test.ts: add tests for helper functions (isLoopbackHost,
  headerValue, extractBearerToken, buildError), routing, tool calls, and
  resource reads (improves coverage from 29.89% to 53%)

Part of sdt1.4.5 coverage burn-down.
